subtasks.description: Query current IAM role and permissions for the user from the identity management system
Fetch pending manager approval status and approval records from the workflow system

Generate multi-step tool invocation plan to: (1) update IAM permissions based on approval, (2) trigger confirmation email notification, and (3) log audit trail. Coordinates with identity management and notification tools from the enterprise registry

plan.cost_rationale: Decomposed into 3 minimal subtasks: (1) fetch_iam_role uses sql_gen (small tier) to query current IAM state from a relational identity store; (2) get_manager_approval uses mongo_query (small tier) to retrieve workflow approvals from document store; these two are independent and run in parallel. (3) orchestrate_provisioning uses multitool_plan (mid tier) because the query explicitly requires multi-tool orchestration across IAM update, email confirmation, and audit logging tools from the enterprise registry. The plan is minimal because it avoids unnecessary policy_action (no compliance/governance check requested—approval is already fetched from workflow), avoids cross_recon (two sources fetched independently, no reconciliation needed), and combines all downstream tool actions into a single multitool_plan. Tier assignments: small for simple lookups, mid for multitool coordination requiring state awareness from upstream tasks.

output.sql: SELECT al.user_id, al.permission, al.resource, al.action, al.result, al.access_time FROM access_log_facts al WHERE al.user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY al.access_time DESC LIMIT 100
